title: dontostemon dentatus var. eglandulosus
intro: Dontostemon dentatus var. eglandulosus, also known as the Eglan-less or non-glandular toothstem, is a variant of the Dontostemon dentatus plant species, which is a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Dontostemon dentatus var. eglandulosus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, Dontostemon dentatus var. eglandulosus is typically dried and made into tea or capsules, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
